channel.title: Settlement Watch - Employment
channel.description: Legal settlements from courts and regulators - Employment

item.title: Laborers District Council Construction Industry Pension Fund, et al., vs. Sea Limited, et al.SLM
[$19.1M] Revised $19.1M Settlement Reached in TGI Friday's Wage and Hour Class Action Lawsuit
item.description: Revised $19.1M Settlement Reached in TGI Friday's Wage and Hour Class Action Lawsuit October 30 2017 New York, NY: Further to a proposed settlement deal reached in September, 2017, preliminary approval has been granted for a revised $19.1 million settlement of an unpaid wage and hour action lawsui

item.title: [$1.0M] McDonald's Franchisees to Pay $1M in Employee Payment Class Action Lawsuit
item.description: McDonald's Franchisees to Pay $1M in Employee Payment Class Action Lawsuit October 26 2017 Wilkes Barre, PS: A $1 million settlement has been reached between Albert and Carol Mueller, the owners of 16 McDonald’s restaurants in Pennsylvania, and plaintiffs in an employment class action laws

item.title: TBJ Drywall and Taping Unpaid Wages Illinois Settlement
[$15M] Liberty University - Falwell Jr. Settlement
item.description: Liberty University pays former president Jerry Falwell Jr. in private settlement.

item.title: [$233M] Disney Employee Wage Settlement
item.description: Disney $233 million settlement with employees wins final approval. Wage and labor class action.
